title: Please update "varlink/go" library
body:
[varlink/go](https://github.com/varlink/go/releases) tagged formal semantic releases so it would be great to update vendored library to a properly released version for the sake of good vendoring practice.

---

Additional problem is that newer _varlink/go_ package was uploaded to Debian and that revision is ahead of the vendored one. Unfortunately there were [breaking changes](https://github.com/varlink/go/pull/14) causing the following FTBFS with the system package:

~~~~
src/github.com/containers/libpod/pkg/varlinkapi/attach.go:22:21: call.Call.Reader undefined (type varlink.Call has no field or method Reader)
src/github.com/containers/libpod/pkg/varlinkapi/attach.go:23:21: call.Call.Writer undefined (type varlink.Call has no field or method Writer)
src/github.com/containers/libpod/pkg/varlinkapi/attach.go:53:33: not enough arguments in call to call.ReplyErrorOccurred
            have (string)
            want (context.Context, string)
src/github.com/containers/libpod/pkg/varlinkapi/attach.go:57:33: not enough arguments in call to call.ReplyErrorOccurred
            have (string)
            want (context.Context, string)
src/github.com/containers/libpod/pkg/varlinkapi/attach.go:61:33: not enough arguments in call to call.ReplyErrorOccurred
            have (string)
            want (context.Context, string)
src/github.com/containers/libpod/pkg/varlinkapi/attach.go:64:33: not enough arguments in call to call.ReplyErrorOccurred
            have (string)
            want (context.Context, string)
src/github.com/containers/libpod/pkg/varlinkapi/attach.go:68:28: not enough arguments in call to call.ReplyAttach
            have ()
            want (context.Context)
src/github.com/containers/libpod/pkg/varlinkapi/attach.go:69:33: not enough arguments in call to call.ReplyErrorOccurred
            have (string)
            want (context.Context, string)
src/github.com/containers/libpod/pkg/varlinkapi/attach.go:118:13: call.Writer undefined (type iopodman.VarlinkCall has no field or method Writer)
src/github.com/containers/libpod/pkg/varlinkapi/config.go:22:29: cannot use &lp (type *LibpodAPI) as type iopodman.iopodmanInterface in argument to iopodman.VarlinkNew:
            *LibpodAPI does not implement iopodman.iopodmanInterface (wrong type for Attach method)
                    have Attach(iopodman.VarlinkCall, string, string, bool) error
                    want Attach(context.Context, iopodman.VarlinkCall, string, string, bool) error
src/github.com/containers/libpod/pkg/varlinkapi/config.go:22:29: too many errors
~~~~

comments.body: @onlyjob thanks for the report.  we are aware of the varlink problem as well and it appears we are going to have to deal with it too.  @jwhonce can you do this in sync with your python upgrade connection?
This issue had no activity for 30 days. In the absence of activity or the "do-not-close" label, the issue will be automatically closed within 7 days.
@github-actions bot wishes this issue were never reported...
Since we have depracated varlink, I don't see this one being fixed.  We are moving to APIV2.
